Everything is a set. This is not necessarily a useful way of working though in practice

== Sections ==
*[[5.1 relations]]
**[[poset]]
*[[5.4 functions]]
[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Chapter 5 Relations and Functions]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Chapter 5 Relations and Functions]][[sn:Chapter 5 Relations and Functions]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
